# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

# Redis Master Configuration
# redis-master.conf

# Network Configuration
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
port 6379

# Security Configuration
requirepass "StrongMasterPassword123!@#"
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_a8f3d9e2b1c4"
rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_x9k2m5n8p1q4"
rename-command DEBUG ""
rename-command KEYS ""

# TLS/SSL Configuration for encrypted replication
tls-port 6380
tls-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/redis-master.crt
tls-key-file /etc/redis/certs/redis-master.key
tls-ca-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/ca.crt
tls-auth-clients yes
tls-replication yes

# Replication Configuration
repl-diskless-sync yes
repl-diskless-sync-delay 5
repl-ping-replica-period 10
repl-timeout 60
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
repl-backlog-size 256mb
repl-backlog-ttl 3600

# High Availability Settings
min-replicas-to-write 0
min-replicas-max-lag 10

# Persistence Configuration
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis

# AOF Configuration
appendonly yes
appendfilename "appendonly.aof"
appendfsync everysec
no-appendfsync-on-rewrite no
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb

# Memory Management
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
maxmemory-samples 5

# Logging
loglevel notice
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-master.log
syslog-enabled yes
syslog-ident redis-master

# Slow Log
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128

# Client Configuration
maxclients 10000
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300
tcp-backlog 511

# Security Hardening
enable-protected-configs yes
enable-debug-command no
enable-module-command no

---

# Redis Slave Configuration 1
# redis-slave1.conf

# Network Configuration
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
port 6379

# Security Configuration
requirepass "StrongSlavePassword456!@#"
masterauth "StrongMasterPassword123!@#"
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_a8f3d9e2b1c4"
rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_x9k2m5n8p1q4"
rename-command DEBUG ""
rename-command KEYS ""

# TLS/SSL Configuration
tls-port 6380
tls-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/redis-slave1.crt
tls-key-file /etc/redis/certs/redis-slave1.key
tls-ca-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/ca.crt
tls-auth-clients yes
tls-replication yes

# Replication Configuration
replicaof redis-master 6380
replica-serve-stale-data yes
replica-read-only yes
repl-diskless-sync yes
repl-diskless-load on-empty-db
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
repl-ping-replica-period 10
repl-timeout 60
repl-backlog-size 256mb

# Persistence Configuration
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump-slave1.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis

# AOF Configuration
appendonly yes
appendfilename "appendonly-slave1.aof"
appendfsync everysec
no-appendfsync-on-rewrite no
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb

# Memory Management
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
maxmemory-samples 5

# Logging
loglevel notice
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-slave1.log
syslog-enabled yes
syslog-ident redis-slave1

# Slow Log
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128

# Client Configuration
maxclients 10000
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300
tcp-backlog 511

---

# Redis Slave Configuration 2
# redis-slave2.conf

# Network Configuration
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
port 6379

# Security Configuration
requirepass "StrongSlavePassword789!@#"
masterauth "StrongMasterPassword123!@#"
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_a8f3d9e2b1c4"
rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_x9k2m5n8p1q4"
rename-command DEBUG ""
rename-command KEYS ""

# TLS/SSL Configuration
tls-port 6380
tls-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/redis-slave2.crt
tls-key-file /etc/redis/certs/redis-slave2.key
tls-ca-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/ca.crt
tls-auth-clients yes
tls-replication yes

# Replication Configuration
replicaof redis-master 6380
replica-serve-stale-data yes
replica-read-only yes
repl-diskless-sync yes
repl-diskless-load on-empty-db
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
repl-ping-replica-period 10
repl-timeout 60
repl-backlog-size 256mb

# Persistence Configuration
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump-slave2.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis

# AOF Configuration
appendonly yes
appendfilename "appendonly-slave2.aof"
appendfsync everysec
no-appendfsync-on-rewrite no
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb

# Memory Management
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
maxmemory-samples 5

# Logging
loglevel notice
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-slave2.log
syslog-enabled yes
syslog-ident redis-slave2

# Slow Log
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128

# Client Configuration
maxclients 10000
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300
tcp-backlog 511

---

# Redis Sentinel Configuration
# sentinel.conf

bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
port 26379

# Security
requirepass "SentinelPassword321!@#"
sentinel auth-pass mymaster StrongMasterPassword123!@#

# TLS Configuration
tls-port 26380
tls-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/sentinel.crt
tls-key-file /etc/redis/certs/sentinel.key
tls-ca-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/ca.crt
tls-replication yes

# Monitor Configuration
sentinel monitor mymaster redis-master 6380 2
sentinel down-after-milliseconds mymaster 5000
sentinel parallel-syncs mymaster 1
sentinel failover-timeout mymaster 10000
sentinel deny-scripts-reconfig yes

# Notification Scripts
sentinel notification-script mymaster /etc/redis/scripts/notify.sh
sentinel client-reconfig-script mymaster /etc/redis/scripts/reconfig.sh

# Logging
logfile /var/log/redis/sentinel.log
syslog-enabled yes
syslog-ident redis-sentinel

---

# Docker Compose Configuration
# docker-compose.yml

version: '3.8'

services:
  redis-master:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-master
    command: redis-server /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf
    volumes:
      - ./redis-master.conf:/usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf:ro
      - ./certs:/etc/redis/certs:ro
      - redis-master-data:/var/lib/redis
      - redis-master-logs:/var/log/redis
    ports:
      - "6379:6379"
      - "6380:6380"
    networks:
      - redis-network
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - SETGID
      - SETUID
      - CHOWN
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  redis-slave1:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-slave1
    command: redis-server /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf
    volumes:
      - ./redis-slave1.conf:/usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf:ro
      - ./certs:/etc/redis/certs:ro
      - redis-slave1-data:/var/lib/redis
      - redis-slave1-logs:/var/log/redis
    ports:
      - "6381:6379"
      - "6382:6380"
    networks:
      - redis-network
    depends_on:
      - redis-master
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - SETGID
      - SETUID
      - CHOWN
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  redis-slave2:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-slave2
    command: redis-server /usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf
    volumes:
      - ./redis-slave2.conf:/usr/local/etc/redis/redis.conf:ro
      - ./certs:/etc/redis/certs:ro
      - redis-slave2-data:/var/lib/redis
      - redis-slave2-logs:/var/log/redis
    ports:
      - "6383:6379"
      - "6384:6380"
    networks:
      - redis-network
    depends_on:
      - redis-master
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - SETGID
      - SETUID
      - CHOWN
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  redis-sentinel:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: redis-sentinel
    command: redis-sentinel /usr/local/etc/redis/sentinel.conf
    volumes:
      - ./sentinel.conf:/usr/local/etc/redis/sentinel.conf:ro
      - ./certs:/etc/redis/certs:ro
      - ./scripts:/etc/redis/scripts:ro
      - redis-sentinel-logs:/var/log/redis
    ports:
      - "26379:26379"
      - "26380:26380"
    networks:
      - redis-network
    depends_on:
      - redis-master
      - redis-slave1
      - redis-slave2
    restart: unless-stopped
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    cap_drop:
      - ALL
    cap_add:
      - SETGID
      - SETUID
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

networks:
  redis-network:
    driver: bridge
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16

volumes:
  redis-master-data:
    driver: local
  redis-master-logs:
    driver: local
  redis-slave1-data:
    driver: local
  redis-slave1-logs:
    driver: local
  redis-slave2-data:
    driver: local
  redis-slave2-logs:
    driver: local
  redis-sentinel-logs:
    driver: local

---

# Kubernetes StatefulSet Configuration
# redis-master-statefulset.yaml

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: redis-master-config
  namespace: redis
data:
  redis.conf: |
    bind 0.0.0.0
    protected-mode yes
    port 6379
    requirepass ${REDIS_MASTER_PASSWORD}
    rename-command FLUSHDB ""
    rename-command FLUSHALL ""
    rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_a8f3d9e2b1c4"
    rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_x9k2m5n8p1q4"
    tls-port 6380
    tls-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/tls.crt
    tls-key-file /etc/redis/certs/tls.key
    tls-ca-cert-file /etc/redis/certs/ca.crt
    tls-auth-clients yes
    tls-replication yes
    min-replicas-to-write 0
    min-replicas-max-lag 10
    appendonly yes
    maxmemory 2gb
    maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: redis-passwords
  namespace: redis
type: Opaque
stringData:
  master-password: StrongMasterPassword123!@#
  slave-password: StrongSlavePassword456!@#
  sentinel-password: SentinelPassword321!@#

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: redis-master
  namespace: redis
spec:
  serviceName: redis-master
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
      role: master
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: redis
        role: master
    spec:
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 999
        fsGroup: 999
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
      - name: redis
        image: redis:7-alpine
        command:
          - redis-server
          - /etc/redis/redis.conf
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: redis
        - containerPort: 6380
          name: redis-tls
        env:
        - name: REDIS_MASTER_PASSWORD
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: redis-passwords
              key: master-password
        volumeMounts:
        - name: config
          mountPath: /etc/redis
        - name: data
          mountPath: /var/lib/redis
        - name: certs
          mountPath: /etc/redis/certs
          readOnly: true
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "2Gi"
            cpu: "1000m"
          limits:
            memory: "4Gi"
            cpu: "2000m"
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
              - ALL
        livenessProbe:
          tcpSocket:
            port: 6379
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          exec:
            command:
              - redis-cli
              - -a
              - $(REDIS_MASTER_PASSWORD)
              - ping
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 5
      volumes:
      - name: config
        configMap:
          name: redis-master-config
      - name: certs
        secret:
          secretName: redis-tls-certs
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - metadata:
      name: data
    spec:
      accessModes: ["ReadWriteOnce"]
      storageClassName: fast-ssd
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: redis-master
  namespace: redis
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 6379
    targetPort: 6379
    name: redis
  - port: 6380
    targetPort: 6380
    name: redis-tls
  selector:
    app: redis
    role: master

---

apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: redis-master-pdb
  namespace: redis
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
      role: master

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: redis-network-policy
  namespace: redis
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: redis
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  - Egress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: redis
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: application
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 6379
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 6380
  egress:
  - to:
    - podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: redis
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 6379
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 6380
